login.title: Log in
login.description: Welcome back to the platform! Please enter your details.
login.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Join the Science for Africa community today.
signup.password_hint: At least 8 characters, 1 number, and 1 special character
signup.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password_minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_number: Password must contain at least one number
validation.password_special: Password must contain at least one special character
validation.fullname_min: Full name must be at least 2 characters

verify_email.verifying_desc: Please wait while we confirm your email address...
verify_email.success_desc: Your account is now active. Redirecting to login page in {{count}}s...
verify_email.failed_desc: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify_email.failed_link_invalid: The verification link was invalid or already used. If you continue to have trouble, please try logging in.
verify_email.confirm_sent_to: We sent you an email to {{email}} with a secret link to confirm your account.
verify_email.confirm_no_email: If you do not see the email within 5 minutes, please contact us at support@sfa.com
verify_email.resend_error: Failed to resend email. Please try again later.
verify_email.already_verified: Your account is already verified! Please log in.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password?
forgot_password.description: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions.
forgot_password.success_description: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}
forgot_password.success_no_email: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or

reset_password.title: Set new password
reset_password.description: Your new password must be different to previously used passwords.
reset_password.success_description: Your password has been successfully reset. Click below to log in.
